creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vd
Date: Thu Oct 24 14:23:53 2013
New Revision: 331489
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331489

Log:
  Fix compilation of ftp/wget when perl 5.18 is installed.
  
  Patch from upstream repo suggested by Anton Yuzhaninov <citrin@citrin.ru>.
  
  PR:		ports/182159
  Submitted by:   Jeremy Chadwick <jdc@koitsu.org>

Added:
  head/ftp/wget/files/patch-doc__texi2pod.pl   (contents, props changed)

Added: head/ftp/wget/files/patch-doc__texi2pod.pl
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/ftp/wget/files/patch-doc__texi2pod.pl	Thu Oct 24 14:23:53 2013	(r331489)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- doc/texi2pod.pl.orig	2013-10-24 16:59:55.000000000 +0300
++++ doc/texi2pod.pl	2013-10-24 17:01:23.000000000 +0300
+@@ -291,7 +291,7 @@
+ 	if (defined $1) {
+             my $thing = $1;
+             if ($ic =~ /\@asis/) {
+-                $_ = "\n=item $thing\n";
++                $_ = "\n=item C<$thing>\n";
+             } else {
+                 # Entity escapes prevent munging by the <> processing below.
+                 $_ = "\n=item $ic\<$thing\>\n";
_______________________________________________
